issue_summary: New package "function" contains univariate and bivariate function objects. "FunctionUtils" contains methods to compose and combine function objects. Together they replace "ComposableFunction" and "BinaryFunction" which are now deprecated.
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Base class for {@link UnivariateRealFunction} that can be composed with other functions.
 *
 * @since 2.1
 * @version $Revision$ $Date$
 */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * Base class for {@link UnivariateRealFunction} that can be composed with other functions.
 *
 * @since 2.1
 * @version $Revision$ $Date$
 * @deprecated in 2.2 (to be removed in 3.0). Please use the function classes
 * in the {@link org.apache.commons.math.analysis.function} package and the
 * methods in {@link FunctionUtils}.
 */
